requests.name: Echo Headers - with Accept and X-Request-Id

body.content: Hello from ReqLab – this is a plain text request body.

requests.name: GET Cookies - resend cookies (add Cookie header manually)
Timestamp – pre-request captures server time
Token – pre-request fetches auth token
requests.preRequestScript:
reqlab.environment.set("requestUser", "alice")
reqlab.environment.set("requestRole", "admin")
reqlab.console.log("Requesting token for", reqlab.environment.get("requestUser"))

requests.name: Protected – validate access with stored token
requests.preRequestScript:
reqlab.environment.set("X-Token", reqlab.environment.get("scriptToken"))
reqlab.console.log("X-Token set from scriptToken:", reqlab.environment.get("scriptToken"))

requests.name: Validate JSON Body – assert schema
requests.preRequestScript: reqlab.console.log("Sending JSON body for schema validation")

requests.name: Echo Full – verify pre-request header injection
requests.preRequestScript:
reqlab.environment.set("X-Request-Id", "req-scripted")
reqlab.environment.set("X-Client", "ReqLab-ScriptEngine")
reqlab.console.log("Injecting X-Request-Id and X-Client via pre-request script")

requests.name: User List – validate response structure
01 Pre-request header/query mutation + scope set
02 Cross-request environment variable usage
requests.preRequestScript:
reqlab.request.headers.upsert("X-Trace-Id", "trace-cross");
reqlab.console.log("Using lastRunId from previous request", reqlab.environment.get("lastRunId"));
